input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - VanArsdel Ltd
Date: 2024-02-21
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Kevin (VanArsdel Ltd)

[00:02:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:05:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Kevin (VanArsdel Ltd): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:31:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:35:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:37:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:39:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.
